## Verification Report: 0160-add-self-update-cli-subcommand

| # | Criterion | Result | Evidence |
|---|-----------|--------|----------|
| 1 | `openstation self-update` updates install cache to latest tag | ✅ PASS | `_latest_tag()` fetches tags via `git fetch --tags --force`, sorts by `version:refname`, returns latest; `git checkout --force` applies it (update.py:44-53, 118-122, 131) |
| 2 | `--version v0.10.0` pins to a specific version | ✅ PASS | `target_version` branch fetches specific tag with `git fetch --depth=1 origin tag <version>` and checks it out (update.py:105-117) |
| 3 | Dirty install cache handled without error | ✅ PASS | Uses `git checkout --force` + `git clean -fd` to force-checkout and remove untracked files (update.py:131, 137) |
| 4 | CLI binary symlink is refreshed after update | ✅ PASS | `_relink_binary()` removes old symlink and creates new one: `~/.local/bin/openstation → dist/openstation` (update.py:56-71, called at line 140) |
| 5 | Old → new version is printed | ✅ PASS | `print(f"Updated: {old_version} → {new_version}")` at update.py:143 |
| 6 | Suggests `openstation init` when run inside a project | ✅ PASS | `_check_project_hint()` checks for `.openstation/` dir and prints hint (update.py:150-154), called after both update and already-up-to-date paths |
| 7 | `docs/cli.md` documents the new subcommand | ✅ PASS | Quick reference table entry + full `## self-update` section with synopsis, flags, behavior, and examples in docs/cli.md |

**All 7 items pass.** Task transitioned to `verified`.

You can run `/openstation.done 0160-add-self-update-cli-subcommand` when ready to accept and complete the task.
